Knitly answer-ready page index.

Homepage:
- https://knitly.io/
  "The best social network for close communities."
  FAQ content: invite-only, private, self-hosted.

Intent page map:
- /intent/families: private social network for families
- /intent/homeschool: homeschool community social app
- /intent/church-groups: church groups social networking platform
- /intent/small-communities: private social network for communities
- /intent/close-friends: invite-only social app for families and friends

Each intent page follows a fixed pattern:
1) direct answer paragraph
2) keyword-aligned use cases
3) intent FAQ schema
4) internal links to related intent pages
